title: Nagarhole National Park
tagline: Nagarhole National Park — wildlife reserve of Karnataka

overview.short: Nagarahole National Park is a national park located in Kodagu district and Mysore district in Karnataka, India.
overview.description: Nagarahole National Park is a national park located in Kodagu district and Mysore district in Karnataka, India. This park was declared the 37th Tiger Reserve of India in 2003. It is part of the Nilgiri Biosphere Reserve. The Western Ghats Nilgiri Sub-Cluster of 6,000 km2 (2,300 sq mi), including all of Nagarhole National Park, is under consideration by the UNESCO World Heritage Committee for selection as a World Heritage Site.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nagarhole National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nagarhole National Park is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nagarhole National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (58 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nagarhole National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nagarhole National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nagarhole National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Nagarhole National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.
